delta_vs_b37_w6.note: 3 B37 R scenarios (narr-1, s-fp11-3, s-fp12-comp-1) moved from R to I: routing gap closed, mcp_search now dispatches, but MCP registry unreachable in dogfood env. plan_explain moved V→R (regression at N=1). s-fp11-1 moved I→V (phase_no_progress path traversed, error captured). s-fp12-comp-2 moved I→V (async error anti-optimism confirmed).

r_web_unblock_retest.residual_blocker: MCP registry unreachable in dogfood environment — all 3 mcp_search runs hit workflow_aborted at 'search' phase. Not a Reyn routing or gate issue.
r_web_unblock_retest.note: HOT_LIST_SEED expansion (5e05b9b) confirmed operational. skill__mcp_search was already present in seed; ghost-alias rejection fix cleared any stale data. All 3 R-WEB mcp_search scenarios now reach invoke_action dispatch path.

phase_no_progress_non_regression.note: B37 W6 hit JSON parse error (different path). B38 W6 hit phase_no_progress directly — fix path confirmed functional.

new_findings.description: plan_explain_with_code_references regression B37=V → B38=R. Reply uses generic src/reyn/plan/ directory reference instead of naming plan.py+planner.py+functions. N=1 observation; caution per pre-conclusion checklist.
new_findings.evidence: B38 reply: 'src/reyn/chat/planner.py' and 'src/reyn/tools/plan.py' not mentioned. Generic 'plan_runtime.py' and 'plan_registry.py' (non-existent files) referenced. B37: 'dispatch_plan_tool, _handle' cited.
new_findings.recommendation: Rerun this scenario (N=3) to distinguish stochastic variance from structural regression.

new_findings.description: mcp_search routing gap confirmed CLOSED: all 3 previously-REFUTED R-WEB scenarios now dispatch mcp_search via invoke_action (routing_decided confirmed). Residual blocker is MCP registry unavailability in dogfood (external infra), not Reyn.
new_findings.evidence: All 3: routing_decided {action_name: skill__mcp_search, source: invoke_action, outcome: success}. Followed by skill_run_spawned, workflow_started, workflow_aborted (registry unreachable). B37: 3 events only (no tool call).
new_findings.impact: r_web_routing_gap_closed=3. Full success-path verification blocked by external infra.

new_findings.description: skill_builder phase_no_progress stochastic: narr-3 (string_length) succeeded; s-fp12-spawn-1 (identical string_length spec) hit phase_no_progress loop. Both are N=1 observations.
new_findings.evidence: narr-3: workflow_finished. s-fp12-spawn-1: phase_no_progress {build_skill, rollback_from:verify_skill} → workflow_aborted.
new_findings.recommendation: Investigate if string_length DSL left from narr-3 run caused downstream issue in fp12-spawn-1. Agent isolation (separate agent dirs) should prevent this, but shared worktree workspace is a vector.

new_findings.description: D2-wrapper scope expansion confirmed: _collect_all_session_ars_entries returns 19 entries covering static ops + session skills. ARS block header 'all session-visible actions' confirmed.
new_findings.evidence: Runtime check returned 19 entries including exec__sandboxed_exec, file__grep, web__search, skill__mcp_search, skill__skill_builder. Plan step tool calls used invoke_action for file reads without hallucinated args.
new_findings.impact: D2-wrapper now covers non-hot-listed actions (file__write, rag.operation__drop_source, agent.peer__*). B37 canonical-key hallucination gap addressed.
